School-Wide Overview
All grades · students shown under their upcoming 2026–27 grade · YTD Spring 2025–26 Diagnostic Results (874 students)
⚠️
CRITICAL: iReady → FAST Reading "Craft & Structure" Blind Spot (Grades 3–9)
iReady Reading reports Vocabulary, Comprehension: Literature, and Comprehension: Informational Text — but it does not separately report a "Reading Across Genres / Craft & Structure" score. FAST ELA Reading explicitly tests figurative language, author's craft, and cross-genre summarizing (ELA.[G].R.3) as part of every form. These skills are invisible in the iReady domain breakdown below — plan a standalone formative check before PM3.
🔀
CRITICAL: K–2 Star Reading Uses a Different Scale Than FAST ELA Reading (Grades 3+)
Students rising into Grades 1–2 will be tested on FAST Star Reading / Star Early Literacy (Renaissance), not directly on Florida B.E.S.T. benchmarks. Star reports its own 0–100 Skill Set Scores and a Unified Scale Score — there is no 1:1 crosswalk from an iReady placement to a Star performance level. Use iReady here to find skill gaps, not to predict a Star score.
